February 14, 2023 · 2 min read Locker Room Design
locker room designwood lockers

Sports lockers to upgrade your locker room

PlayerStall sports lockers have been helping teams for decades to upgrade their locker room. Having helped over 500 teams across North America, we are proud on

PlayerStall sports lockers have been helping teams for decades to upgrade their locker room. Having helped over 500 teams across North America, we are proud on being the low cost, highest value manufacturer of wood lockers in the industry.

If your team is budget conscious, PlayerStall wood lockers are your solution to upgrade your room while not breaking the bank.

Unlike other manufacturers out there, our wooden lockers are made with full 3/4” cabinet grade plywood. Our classically designed wood lockers will look good for decades, and its robust design will ensure that they last decades too.

Feel free to take a look at some of our recent projects in our gallery or go to our facebook page to get an idea of what to expect from us. We fully custom size the lockers to fit your locker room perfectly.

If you are interested in upgrading your locker room, feel free to fill out a form and we will send you a layout. Also, feel free to call our toll free phone number anytime to talk us about how we can help.

Ready for Custom Sports Lockers?

Get a free design consultation. 30+ years experience. Lifetime guarantee.

Get Free Consultation

PlayerStall

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month (24" & 30" widths) or custom-built in three months. 30+ years of craftsmanship.

2934 200 Street, Langley, BC V2Z 2C1 Canada

sales@playerstall.com

1 888 584 1444

QUICK CONTACT INFO

Premium wood lockers at unbeatable prices. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks or custom in 8–12 weeks. We'll match any USA competitor's price. Call for a free quote.
